title: Ustraa Consulting Pvt Ltd is Hiring: E-commerce Executive (Lead)

jsonLd.title: Ustraa Consulting Pvt Ltd is Hiring: E-commerce Executive (Lead)
jsonLd.description:
Ustraa Consulting Pvt Ltd invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of E-commerce Executive at our Gwalior location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Ustraa Consulting Pvt Ltd:
Ustraa Consulting Pvt Ltd is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery
• Monitor and improve Net Promoter Score (NPS) and customer satisfaction
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs
• Manage email marketing campaigns and push notifications
• Develop and implement category growth strategies
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in Customer Segmentation
• Proficiency in SEO/SEM
• Proficiency in Magento
• Proficiency in Email Marketing
• Proficiency in A/B Testing
• Proficiency in Affiliate Marketing
• Proficiency in Supply Chain

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Gwalior, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Ustraa Consulting Pvt Ltd!
